title: gardenia subcarinata var. sumatrana
intro: Gardenia subcarinata var. sumatrana, also known as Sumatran gardenia or gardenia subcarinata, is a species of flowering plant in the gardenia family, characterized by its white, fragrant flowers and dark green, leathery leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is believed to have potential health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, and improving skin health. The leaves and flowers of the plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties. However, further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of Gardenia subcarinata var. sumatrana for medicinal use.
